target.title: Add Codex account switcher promotion
target.body: ## Summary - keep the Codex status-menu account switcher display-only; selecting an account there only changes the displayed account - add explicit `System Account` submenu promotion for managed Codex accounts, which copies the chosen managed auth into the live Codex home - after a successful system-account switch, show a notice that Codex CLI auth changes immediately and the Codex desktop app must be quit/reopened to pick up the new account - restart the configured Codex background service after auth promotion, preserving remote-control mode by using `codex remote-control start` when daemon settings enable remote control - refresh account-scoped Codex state as user-initiated work and surface daemon restart failures with command-neutral, remote-control-safe guidance ## Review repair / proof - Rebased on current `main` (`b3c0d57`), so the Providers pane search implementation, localized strings, tests, and changelog entry remain from main. - Verified the PR diff no longer touches the provider-search files: - `git diff --name-status origin/main | rg "PreferencesProvidersPane|PreferencesProviderSidebarView|Localizable.strings|CHANGELOG|ProvidersPaneCoverageTests"` produced no output. - Verified provider search still runs in the focused macOS suite: - `ProvidersPaneCoverageTests` included `provider search filters display names and raw ids`. - Added `Localizable.strings` entries for the new success notice, restart-failure text, restart-failure title, and `Last output:` in all bundled locales. `plutil -lint Sources/CodexBar/Resources/*.lproj/Localizable.strings` passed on macOS. - Redacted real-app proof from the Mac mini Codex desktop app setup: - Before/account-limited state, with private sidebar/project details redacted: - After account switch, with account email/sidebar/project details redacted: - Redacted proof image hashes: - before: `5b4747336157357ba38d49701a858b2c1f38bca875cec6d94ca06b5c325704f4` - after: `8b20ab01fa9428df6ea2e86aac860224655344bd1aeef2b590e357e4ebe6b246` - Redacted menu-flow proof from the macOS behavior test harness: - Flow: Codex status menu -> `System Account` submenu -> `[managed-account]`. - Normal account switcher click remains display-only via `StatusMenuCodexSwitcherTests`. - Resulting live account: live auth changed from `[live-account]` to `[managed-account]` in isolated `CODEX_HOME`. - Success feedback: alert title `System account switched`, message includes `quit and reopen`. - Restart feedback: `RecordingCodexAppServerDaemonReloader.reloadCallCount == 1`, with success outcome `.restarted`. - Failure feedback: restart failure presents alert title `System account switched`; message includes `configured Codex background service`, `quit and reopen`, and the captured restart output. - Remote-control preservation: with daemon settings `{"remoteControlEnabled": true}`, command log is `["app-server daemon version", "remote-control start"]`. - Rebuilt/deployed proof on the Mac mini from PR head `c4a43c83`: - Packaged from detached worktree `/tmp/codexbar-pr1218-deploy-c4a43c8` with `CODEXBAR_SIGNING=adhoc ./Scripts/package_app.sh release`. - `codesign --verify --deep --strict /tmp/codexbar-pr1218-deploy-c4a43c8/CodexBar.app` exited 0 before install. - Installed app reports `CodexGitCommit=c4a43c83`. - Running process after launch: `22772 /Users/openclaw/projects/CodexBar/CodexBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CodexBar`. - Rechecked after 5 seconds: same process remained running. - Rollback bundle preserved at `/Users/openclaw/projects/CodexBar/CodexBar.app.backup-11fab4e-before-c4a43c8-20260529T2252Z` and reports `CodexGitCommit=11fab4ee`. ## Testing - `git diff --check` - `plutil -lint /tmp/codexbar-review-switch-test/Sources/CodexBar/Resources/*.lproj/Localizable.strings` on macOS - Slop check on the final diff: no placeholders, filler comments, commented-out code, scope drift, duplicate logic, or missing guardrails found. - `swift test --package-path /tmp/codexbar-review-switch-test --filter "CodexAppServerDaemonReloaderTests|CodexSystemPromotionUITests|StatusMenuCodexSystemPromotionTests|CodexAccountPromotionServiceTests|StatusMenuCodexSwitcherTests|ProviderStorageFootprintTests|ProvidersPaneCoverageTests|LocalizationBundleTests|UserFacingLocalizationCoverageTests"` on macOS - Passed: 100 tests in 9 suites.
target.author: rendrag-git
